name: Carriage Services, Inc.
description: Carriage Services, Inc. is a leading provider of deathcare services and products in the United States. The company operates funeral homes and cemeteries, offering a comprehensive range of services including consultation, preparation, and transportation of remains, as well as cremation and memorialization services. Carriage Services is committed to providing personalized and compassionate care to families during their time of need, operating with a decentralized management model that empowers local leadership.
